address.address: No:231, Baba Sabarapalya Near Check Post, Next HP Petrol Bunk, Mysore Road, Kengeri India

pos_sentences.text: Faculties  knowledge and cooperation in the classes
pos_sentences.name: YASHIKA

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure is also good enough and classes are also comfortable
pos_sentences.name: YASHIKA

pos_sentences.text: Course structure is also good, knowledgeable subjects are there
pos_sentences.name: YASHIKA

pos_sentences.text: We have many different clubs where we can participate and improve our skills
pos_sentences.name: Rohit kushwaha

pos_sentences.text: We have case study base learning which helps a student to grab the knowledge faster
pos_sentences.name: Rohit kushwaha

pos_sentences.text: Diversification, different cultural types and massive availability of books, articles, novels in the library.
pos_sentences.name: SHYAM KISHORE KASHEEPURI

pos_sentences.text: positive interactions with others, competitiveness in the classroom, and availability of resources in the campus.
pos_sentences.name: SHYAM KISHORE KASHEEPURI

neg_sentences.text: Academics criteria is not cooperative and too strict which make many students suffer during exams
neg_sentences.name: YASHIKA

neg_sentences.text: Fees structure is also not appropriate according to ROI
neg_sentences.name: YASHIKA

neg_sentences.text: The canteen food is not up to the mark..
neg_sentences.name: Rohit kushwaha

neg_sentences.text: The management of the clubs can be improved
neg_sentences.name: Rohit kushwaha

neg_sentences.text: Hostel facility for large group of students in the campus is not there.
neg_sentences.name: SHYAM KISHORE KASHEEPURI

neg_sentences.text: Flexible timing for classes and Weather of Bangalore.
neg_sentences.name: SHYAM KISHORE KASHEEPURI

neg_sentences.text: Cultural groupism in classroom and location of Bangalore Campus which is very far from the main city.
neg_sentences.name: SHYAM KISHORE KASHEEPURI
